metadata.sources: RoofingCalc.com, This Old House 2026, Angi, NerdWallet, GAF/OC/CertainTeed spec sheets, contractor surveys
metadata.notes: Prices are per roofing square (100 sqft) installed, including tear-off of one layer, underlayment, and standard accessories.

three_tab.label: 3-Tab Asphalt Shingles
three_tab.tag: Budget option. 15-20 year lifespan. Flat appearance.
three_tab.brands: IKO Marathon, Atlas StormMaster, TAMKO Heritage

architectural.label: Architectural Shingles
architectural.tag: Most popular. 25-30 year warranty. Dimensional look.
architectural.brands: GAF Timberline HDZ, OC Duration, CertainTeed Landmark, Malarkey Vista

designer.label: Designer / Luxury Shingles
designer.tag: Premium appearance. 40-50 year warranty. Slate/cedar look.
designer.brands: GAF Grand Canyon, OC Berkshire, CertainTeed Grand Manor, Malarkey Windsor

metal_standing_seam.label: Standing Seam Metal
metal_standing_seam.tag: 50+ year lifespan. Energy efficient. Premium look.
metal_standing_seam.brands: Drexel Metals, Berridge, McElroy Metal, ATAS

tile_concrete.label: Concrete Tile
tile_concrete.tag: 50+ year lifespan. Heavy -- requires structural assessment.

complex.label: Complex (multiple levels, many dormers, steep pitch)

questionsToAskContractor: What shingle brand, product line, and color are you proposing?
Is this a full tear-off or an overlay? How many layers currently?
What underlayment -- 15lb felt, 30lb felt, or synthetic?
Is ice and water shield included at eaves, valleys, and penetrations?
What type of ventilation -- ridge vent, box vents, or power vent?
Are all flashings being replaced (chimney, pipe boots, valleys, step)?
What is the per-sheet price for decking repair if needed?
Is the permit included? Who pulls it?
What are the manufacturer warranty and workmanship warranty separately?
How will you protect my property (tarps, magnetic nail sweep, yard protection)?
